targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='modelo' THEN ht.value END) AS 'Modelo', MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='andar' THEN ht.value END) AS 'Piso', MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='zona' THEN ht.value END) AS 'Zona', MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='os_version' THEN ht.value END) AS 'IOS Version', MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='funcao' THEN ht.value END) AS 'Função', MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='fabricante' THEN ht.value END) AS 'Fabricante' FROM host_tag ht JOIN hosts h ON ht.hostid=h.hostid WHERE h.host='${switch}'
